subject: Remove custom encryption from SO
commit_message:
Remove custom encryption from SO

- remove custom encryption and decryption logic
- this also requires chart changes that have to go
  along with it

Issue-ID: SO-4300
Change-Id: I24e07dda99066c3147d2043e4ed4213c464d1ed9
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <fiete.ostkamp@telekom.de>
